TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Skaru Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Skaru a niyaro', 78 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 152 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 40% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 61 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 60% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 91 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal37%, Saysiyat3%, Bunun1%.
S.PHON: skaro~u~u itiniaj i wo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u skaro~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, sajsijat*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%.
S.FORM: Skaru Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Skaru a niyaro', 78 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 152 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 40% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 61 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 60% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 91 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal37%, Saysiyat3%, Bunun1%.
S.PHON: skaro~u~u itiniaj i wo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u skaro~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, sajsijat*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%.
